SEARCH
Package dev.jeka.core.api.depmanagement.publication

Class JkPomMetadata

java.lang.Object
dev.jeka.core.api.depmanagement.publication.JkPomMetadata
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class JkPomMetadata extends Object implements Serializable
These are extra information required to publish on Maven central.
See Also:

    • fillWith

      public void fillWith(JkPomMetadata other)
      Copies the metadata information from the specified JkPomMetadata instance into this instance, including project details, SCM information, developers list, and licenses list.
      Parameters:
      other - the JkPomMetadata instance from which to copy information.
